name: Confluence MCP
description: Access and manage Confluence wiki pages, spaces, and documentation. Enables AI-powered knowledge base search, page creation, and content summarization.

name: GitHub MCP
description: Full integration with GitHub for managing repositories, pull requests, and issues. Enables automated code reviews, branch management, and project tracking directly from your AI assistant.

name: Google Search MCP
description: Provides web search capabilities using Google's Custom Search API. Ideal for fact-checking, retrieving current information, and augmenting AI responses with real-time web data.

name: Jira MCP
description: Integration with Atlassian Jira for agile project management and ticket tracking. Streamlines issue creation, sprint management, and backlog grooming workflows.

name: PostgreSQL MCP
description: Secure read/write access to PostgreSQL databases with schema introspection. Ideal for data analysis, reporting, and ad-hoc queries against structured data stores.

name: Slack MCP
description: Real-time communication integration for Slack channels and direct messages. Enables chat-based automation, notifications, and channel management from AI workflows.

name: Test Agent
description: A test agent for validating MCP configurations and testing AI agent workflows.
